title: Email
scope: Gmail integration: connect Gmail accounts via OAuth, define rule-based inbox processing (label, archive, mark read), and view a processed-email activity log. NOT a full mail client — it's account linking + automated inbox rules.

specs.title: Connect a Gmail account
specs.behavior: Connecting runs the Gmail OAuth flow (start + callback) and registers the account.

specs.title: List accounts
specs.behavior: Listing returns the connected Gmail accounts.

specs.title: Update an account
specs.behavior: Updating changes a connected account's settings.

specs.title: Disconnect an account
specs.behavior: Disconnecting removes a linked Gmail account.

specs.title: List rules
specs.behavior: Listing returns the configured inbox rules.

specs.title: Create a rule
specs.behavior: Creating adds an inbox rule (label, archive, mark read) that processes matching email.

specs.title: Update a rule
specs.behavior: Updating changes an existing inbox rule.

specs.title: Reorder rules
specs.behavior: Reordering sets the evaluation order of inbox rules.

specs.title: View processed-email log
specs.behavior: The log returns the history of processed email.

specs.title: List labels
specs.behavior: Listing returns the Gmail labels available for rules.
